# Topics this target subscribes to via rosbridge.
# One per line. Optional whitespace-separated message type lets rosbridge
# resolve the type without a probe.
#
# Example:
#     /scan      sensor_msgs/msg/LaserScan
#     /odom      nav_msgs/msg/Odometry
#
# This file is auto-generated by helpers/discover_ros2.sh when you run the
# generator with --topics-file. Edit by hand to prune or to add topics that
# only exist intermittently.
